originalTitle: Artificial Intelligence (AI) Stocks Have Crushed the Broader Market in 2026. Here Are 2 Top Stocks to Buy Before They Soar Higher This Earnings Season and Beyond
summary: These two AI stocks have struggled lately, but their solid earnings growth potential suggests they can step on the gas again.
content: These two AI stocks have struggled lately, but their solid earnings growth potential suggests they can step on the gas again.
chineseTitle: AI (AI) 股票将在 2026 年碾压更广泛的市场。以下是在本财报季及以后飙升之前值得买入的 2 只热门股票
chineseSummary: 这两只人工智能股票最近表现不佳，但其强劲的盈利增长潜力表明它们可以再次加速。

whyItMatters: 这条信息属于财经市场信号，适合用于观察利率、汇率、股债商品、金融机构和宏观政策变化。
